title: About
text:
My name is Mia B. Franco. I am a graduate student in Forest Sciences at Colorado State University, Fort Collins. I am studying the longevity of fuel treatments. Outside of my work, I enjoy backpacking, running, and hiking.

title: Mia B. Franco
text:
My name is Mia B. Franco, and I am a graduate student in Forest Sciences at Colorado State University, Fort Collins.
Currently, I study fuel treatment longevity in ponderosa pine dominated forests. My overall interests lay in post disturbance regeneration, and the overall response of the ecosystem. I am specifically interested in delayed responses, and the mortality of big trees.
